items.title: Rosenior: Estêvão in tears after 'devastating' injury
items.summary: Chelsea boss Liam Rosenior has revealed that Estêvão was in tears at half-time after he was forced off with an injury early in his side's defeat to Manchester United on Sunday.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Rybakina beats Muchova for 2nd title in Stuttgart
items.summary: Elena Rybakina defeated Karolina Muchova 7-5, 6-1 to win the Porsche Tennis Grand Prix for the second time.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
